Web:S6847.name: Non-interactive elements shouldn't have event handlers

Web:S6853.name: Label elements should have a text label and an associated control

javascript:S3358.name: Ternary operators should not be nested

javascript:S7735.name: Negated conditions should be avoided when an else clause is present

javascript:S7722.name: Built-in error objects should have meaningful messages

javascript:S4624.name: Template literals should not be nested

javascript:S7781.name: Strings should use "replaceAll()" instead of "replace()" with global regex

css:S7924.name: Text and background colors should have sufficient contrast

javascript:S2871.name: "Array.prototype.sort()" and "Array.prototype.toSorted()" should use a compare function

javascript:S1481.name: Unused local variables and functions should be removed

javascript:S7772.name: Node.js built-in modules should be imported using the "node:" protocol

javascript:S3776.name: Cognitive Complexity of functions should not be too high
